pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Applied Analytics & BI is a primary or secondary domain for the Director of Data Science. This task KSA is within scope for the role's expected competency profile and seniority level (director).

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Framework signal is weak (composite 0.449). External validation of this task KSA for the Director of Data Science role relies primarily on domain-level alignment rather than specific framework matches.

pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: domain-level relevance of Applied Analytics & BI for the Director of Data Science is corroborated by DAMA-DMBOK, CDO survey data, and role-specific job market analysis, despite weak cross-framework signal.

decision_rationale: Applied Analytics & BI task KSA is within scope for the Director of Data Science at the director tier. Seniority fit is appropriate. All three evaluation passes support inclusion.
